data.body: CHECKPOINT: Replaced 4 references to hardcoded '5 sub-agents' in validate-work/SKILL.md with dynamic/config-driven language: (1) 'run all 5 sub-agents' → 'run all sub-agents', (2) 'X of 5 domains' → 'X of N domains', (3) 'all 5 domains PASS' → 'all domains PASS', (4) 'Max 5 sub-agents — respects the project concurrency limit' → 'Max sub-agents bounded by orchestration.max_agents — respects the project concurrency limit (see dso-config.conf)'
